name: shared-skills
description: Cross-compatible LLM skills for Claude Code and Codex: ag, bash, changelog, chatgpt-docs, claude-docs, claude-cli, claude-cli-docs, codex-docs, codex-cli, codex-cli-docs, git, markdownlint, powershell, skill-creator, skill-linting, skill-test-drive, skill-validation, sqlite, zoxide, and many more system utilities.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable skills for developer workflows and utilities.
interface.longDescription: Reusable cross-compatible skills for common developer workflows, shell utilities, skill authoring, and shared tooling.
defaultPrompt: Use Shared Skills to help with git, shell, files, and reusable tooling workflows.
Use Shared Skills to author, lint, or validate an agent skill.
